name: Duke Xiang of Qin

sections.short-biography: Sixth ruler of the Zhou Dynasty vassal state Qin.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	秦襄公


	 Pronunciation 
	Qin2xiang1gong1


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Qínxiānggōng


	 Wade-Giles 
	Ch‘in-hsiang-kung

	Prince Xiang

	 Name Notes 
	His ancestral name was Ying 嬴 and Duke Xiang 襄公 was his posthumous title.

full_text:
Duke Xiang of Qin 秦襄公
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Duke Xiang of Qin (秦襄公). Sixth ruler of the Zhou Dynasty vassal state Qin. Duke Xiang of Qin was an historic figure affiliated with Qin State and Zhou Dynasty.
